pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Rusty Path of Building is a native Linux runtime for the Path of Building / Path of Building 2 build planners. It replaces SimpleGraphic, PoB's official C++ runtime, with a Rust implementation that handles window management, input, rendering (wgpu/Vulkan) and the LuaJIT host PoB's Lua code runs against.
PoB's Lua code itself is not packaged - the runtime downloads it into ~/.local/share/RustyPathOfBuilding{1,2}/ on first launch.
The Cargo dependency graph is vendored offline via files/make-vendor.sh rather than enumerated via cargo eclass CRATES= (~300 crates, impractical to maintain by hand).
